## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- xQuakShell version: [e.g. 1.2.3 or commit hash]
- Go version (if building from source): [e.g. 1.24]
- Node version (if building from source): [e.g. 20.x]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. **Do not include passwords, keys, or other secrets.**
